color.$description: Brand and semantic colours used across the product.

primary.$description: Primary brand colour used for calls to action.

secondary.$description: Muted secondary colour for supporting elements.

elevated.$description: Surface colour for cards raised above the page.

small.$description: Tight spacing for compact, dense layouts.

body.$description: Default reading typeface for body copy.

background.$description: The button surface, aliasing the primary brand colour.

padding.$deprecated: Use the responsive padding scale instead.
